system.c(3) Library Functions Manual system.c(3)

NAME

system.c - System utilities for WASM/Emscripten - includes generic implementations.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


const char * platform_getenv (const char *name)
Get an environment variable value. const char * platform_strerror (int errnum)
Get human-readable error message for a system error code. int platform_setenv (const char *name, const char *value)
Set an environment variable. int platform_unsetenv (const char *name)
pid_t platform_get_pid (void)
Get the current process ID. ssize_t platform_write (int fd, const void *buf, size_t count)
Platform-safe write function.

Detailed Description

System utilities for WASM/Emscripten - includes generic implementations.

This file is structured like posix/system.c and windows/system.c:

1.
Platform-specific implementations go first
2.
Generic implementations from ../system.c are included at the end

Definition in file wasm/system.c.

Function Documentation

int platform_unsetenv (const char * name)

Definition at line 56 of file wasm/system.c.

56                                         {
57   (void)name;
58   return -1; // Not supported in WASM
59 }
